options.content:
## Safety & Policy
Privacy posture, permission mode, content capture signals, and policy friction.

azureLogAnalytics.query: union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies, AppEvents | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where tostring(Properties) has_any ('github.copilot', 'gen_ai.operation.name', 'agentops.', 'copilot_chat', 'codex') or Message has_any ('github.copilot', 'AgentOps', 'copilot_chat', 'codex') or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') | extend conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['service.name'])), tostring(Properties['service.name']), iff(isnotempty(AppRoleName), AppRoleName, 'agent'))), '_', iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), iff(isnotempty(OperationId), OperationId, 'session')), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), iff(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) startswith 'azure-mcp-', 'azure-mcp', '')), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type'])  | summarize Signals=countif(tostring(Properties['agentops.content_capture.signal']) =~ 'true' or tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.input.messages' or tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.output.messages' or tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.tool.call.arguments' or tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.tool.call.result') by TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), ''), fallback_session=strcat(iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['service.name'])), tostring(Properties['service.name']), iff(isnotempty(AppRoleName), AppRoleName, 'agent'))), '_', iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), iff(isnotempty(OperationId), OperationId, 'session')), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm')) | join kind=leftouter (AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), '') | where isnotempty(direct_session) | summarize operation_session=take_any(direct_session) by OperationId) on OperationId | extend conversation=iff(isnotempty(operation_session), operation_session, iff(isnotempty(direct_session), direct_session, fallback_session)) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), iff(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) startswith 'azure-mcp-', 'azure-mcp', '')), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type'])  | summarize AllowAll=max(toint(tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.allow_all']) == 'true')) by conversation, bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | summarize Sessions=sum(AllowAll) by TimeGenerated | order by TimeGenerated asc

union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies, AppEvents | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where tostring(Properties) has_any ('github.copilot', 'gen_ai.operation.name', 'agentops.', 'copilot_chat', 'codex') or Message has_any ('github.copilot', 'AgentOps', 'copilot_chat', 'codex') or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') | extend conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['service.name'])), tostring(Properties['service.name']), iff(isnotempty(AppRoleName), AppRoleName, 'agent'))), '_', iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), iff(isnotempty(OperationId), OperationId, 'session')), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), iff(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) startswith 'azure-mcp-', 'azure-mcp', '')), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type'])  | summarize Blocks=countif(tostring(Properties) has 'preToolUse' or Message has 'AgentOps preToolUse policy') by TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), ''), fallback_session=strcat(iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['service.name'])), tostring(Properties['service.name']), iff(isnotempty(AppRoleName), AppRoleName, 'agent'))), '_', iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), iff(isnotempty(OperationId), OperationId, 'session')), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm')) | join kind=leftouter (AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), '') | where isnotempty(direct_session) | summarize operation_session=take_any(direct_session) by OperationId) on OperationId | extend conversation=iff(isnotempty(operation_session), operation_session, iff(isnotempty(direct_session), direct_session, fallback_session)) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), iff(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) startswith 'azure-mcp-', 'azure-mcp', '')), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type'])  | summarize Sessions=dcountif(conversation, tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.remote']) == 'enabled') by TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

// Policy and governance posture for Copilot CLI AgentOps.
// Uses privacy-safe AgentOps resource attributes from the shim plus documented
// Copilot runtime events. No prompt, response, tool argument, or URL content is required.
let lookback = 7d;
let session_id = (props:dynamic, timestamp:datetime) {
    case(
        isnotempty(tostring(props["gen_ai.conversation.id"])),
        tostring(props["gen_ai.conversation.id"]),
        isnotempty(tostring(props["github.copilot.interaction_id"])),
        tostring(props["github.copilot.interaction_id"]),
        strcat(
            tostring(props["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
            "_",
            tostring(props["github.copilot.turn_count"]),
            "_",
            format_datetime(bin(timestamp, 1h), "yyyyMMdd_HHmm")
        )
    )
};
let sessions =
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where (Properties has "github.copilot" or Properties has "gen_ai.operation.name" or Properties has "agentops." or AppRoleName in ("github-copilot", "copilot-chat", "github-copilot-cli", "codex", "openai-codex", "openai-codex-cli") or tostring(Properties["service.name"]) in ("github-copilot", "copilot-chat", "github-copilot-cli", "codex", "openai-codex", "openai-codex-cli") or tostring(Properties["agent.runtime"]) in ("codex", "openai-codex-cli"))
| extend
    session = session_id(Properties, TimeGenerated),
    operation = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.operation.name"]),
    model = coalesce(tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.model"]), tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"])),
    mode = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.mode"]),
    remote = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.remote"]),
    output_format = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.output_format"]),
    allow_all = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.allow_all"]) == "true",
    acp = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.acp"]) == "true",
    cwd_changed = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.cwd_changed"]) == "true",
    session_id_provided = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.session_id_provided"]) == "true",
    share = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.share"]) == "true",
    share_gist = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.share_gist"]) == "true",
    stream = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.stream"]),
    reasoning_effort = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.reasoning_effort"]),
    allow_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.allow_tool.count"]),
    deny_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.deny_tool.count"]),
    available_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.available_tools.count"]),
    excluded_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.excluded_tools.count"]),
    secret_env_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.secret_env_vars.count"]),
    attachment_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.attachment.count"]),
    plugin_dir_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.plugin_dir.count"]),
    additional_mcp_config_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.additional_mcp_config.count"]),
    disabled_mcp_server_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.disabled_mcp_server.count"]),
    github_mcp_tool_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.github_mcp_tool.count"]),
    github_mcp_toolset_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.github_mcp_toolset.count"]),
    configured_mcp_server_names = tostring(Properties["agentops.mcp.config.servers"]),
    disabled_mcp_server_names = tostring(Properties["agentops.mcp.disabled.servers"]),
    github_mcp_tool_names = tostring(Properties["agentops.mcp.github.tools"]),
    github_mcp_toolset_names = tostring(Properties["agentops.mcp.github.toolsets"]),
    content_capture = tostring(Properties["agentops.content_capture.signal"]) =~ "true"
        or isnotempty(tostring(Properties["gen_ai.input.messages"]))
        or isnotempty(tostring(Properties["gen_ai.output.messages"]))
        or isnotempty(tostring(Properties["gen_ai.tool.call.arguments"]))
        or isnotempty(tostring(Properties["gen_ai.tool.call.result"])),
    error = tostring(Properties["error.type"])
| summarize
    started = min(TimeGenerated),
    ended = max(TimeGenerated),
    spans = count(),
    failures = countif(Success == false or isnotempty(error)),
    allow_all = max(toint(allow_all)),
    allow_rules = max(allow_count),
    deny_rules = max(deny_count),
    available_tool_filters = max(available_count),
    excluded_tool_filters = max(excluded_count),
    secret_env_redactions = max(secret_env_count),
    attachments = max(attachment_count),
    plugin_dirs = max(plugin_dir_count),
    additional_mcp_configs = max(additional_mcp_config_count),
    disabled_mcp_servers = max(disabled_mcp_server_count),
    github_mcp_tools = max(github_mcp_tool_count),
    github_mcp_toolsets = max(github_mcp_toolset_count),
    acp_enabled = max(toint(acp)),
    changed_working_directory = max(toint(cwd_changed)),
    provided_session_id = max(toint(session_id_provided)),
    shared_markdown = max(toint(share)),
    shared_gist = max(toint(share_gist)),
    content_capture_signals = countif(content_capture),
    modes = make_set_if(mode, isnotempty(mode), 5),
    models = make_set_if(model, isnotempty(model), 5),
    remote_states = make_set_if(remote, isnotempty(remote), 3),
    output_formats = make_set_if(output_format, isnotempty(output_format), 3),
    streams = make_set_if(stream, isnotempty(stream), 3),
    reasoning_efforts = make_set_if(reasoning_effort, isnotempty(reasoning_effort), 5),
    configured_mcp_server_names = make_set_if(configured_mcp_server_names, isnotempty(configured_mcp_server_names), 10),
    disabled_mcp_server_names = make_set_if(disabled_mcp_server_names, isnotempty(disabled_mcp_server_names), 10),
    github_mcp_tool_names = make_set_if(github_mcp_tool_names, isnotempty(github_mcp_tool_names), 10),
    github_mcp_toolset_names = make_set_if(github_mcp_toolset_names, isnotempty(github_mcp_toolset_names), 10)
    by session;
let events =
union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where tostring(Properties) has_any ("github.copilot", "agentops.", "gen_ai.operation.name", "codex") or Message has_any ("github.copilot", "AgentOps", "codex")
| extend
    session = session_id(Properties, TimeGenerated),
    event = coalesce(tostring(Properties["event.name"]), tostring(Properties["github.copilot.event.name"]), Name),
    message = tostring(Message)
| summarize
    policy_blocks = countif(message has "AgentOps preToolUse policy" or event has "permission" or event has "policy"),
    hook_errors = countif(event == "github.copilot.hook.error" or event has "hook.error"),
    aborts = countif(event == "github.copilot.session.abort"),
    exceptions = countif(event == "exception")
    by session;
sessions
| join kind=leftouter events on session
| extend
    policy_blocks = coalesce(policy_blocks, 0),
    hook_errors = coalesce(hook_errors, 0),
    aborts = coalesce(aborts, 0),
    exceptions = coalesce(exceptions, 0),
    risk = case(
        content_capture_signals > 0, "content_capture",
        allow_all > 0, "allow_all",
        shared_gist > 0, "shared_gist",
        additional_mcp_configs > 0 or plugin_dirs > 0, "session_extension",
        acp_enabled > 0, "acp_server",
        policy_blocks > 0, "policy_blocked",
        hook_errors > 0 or exceptions > 0, "policy_runtime_error",
        deny_rules > 0 or excluded_tool_filters > 0, "restricted",
        "normal"
    )
| project
    started,
    ended,
    session,
    risk,
    modes,
    models,
    remote_states,
    output_formats,
    streams,
    reasoning_efforts,
    allow_all = allow_all > 0,
    acp_enabled = acp_enabled > 0,
    changed_working_directory = changed_working_directory > 0,
    provided_session_id = provided_session_id > 0,
    shared_markdown = shared_markdown > 0,
    shared_gist = shared_gist > 0,
    allow_rules,
    deny_rules,
    available_tool_filters,
    excluded_tool_filters,
    secret_env_redactions,
    attachments,
    plugin_dirs,
    additional_mcp_configs,
    disabled_mcp_servers,
    github_mcp_tools,
    github_mcp_toolsets,
    configured_mcp_server_names,
    disabled_mcp_server_names,
    github_mcp_tool_names,
    github_mcp_toolset_names,
    content_capture_signals,
    policy_blocks,
    hook_errors,
    aborts,
    exceptions,
    failures,
    spans
| order by started desc

union isfuzzy=true AppDependencies, AppTraces | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where tostring(Properties) has_any ('github.copilot', 'agentops.', 'gen_ai.operation.name', 'codex') or Message has_any ('github.copilot', 'AgentOps', 'codex') or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') | extend conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['service.name'])), tostring(Properties['service.name']), iff(isnotempty(AppRoleName), AppRoleName, 'agent'))), '_', iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), iff(isnotempty(OperationId), OperationId, 'session')), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']), allow_all=tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.allow_all']) == 'true', allow_all_tools=tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.allow_all_tools']) == 'true', allow_all_paths=tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.allow_all_paths']) == 'true', allow_all_urls=tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.allow_all_urls']) == 'true', allow_tool_count=toint(Properties['agentops.cli.allow_tool.count']), allow_url_count=toint(Properties['agentops.cli.allow_url.count']), deny_tool_count=toint(Properties['agentops.cli.deny_tool.count']), deny_url_count=toint(Properties['agentops.cli.deny_url.count']), available_tool_count=toint(Properties['agentops.cli.available_tools.count']), excluded_tool_count=toint(Properties['agentops.cli.excluded_tools.count']), disabled_mcp_server_count=toint(Properties['agentops.cli.disabled_mcp_server.count']), extra_mcp_config_count=toint(Properties['agentops.cli.additional_mcp_config.count']), configured_mcp_servers=tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), disabled_mcp_servers=tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.disabled.servers'])  | extend is_tool=operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool), is_policy_block=tostring(Properties) has 'preToolUse' or tostring(Properties) has 'permissionDecision' or tostring(Properties) has 'AgentOps preToolUse policy' or Message has 'AgentOps preToolUse policy' or Message has 'permission', is_retry_hint=Message has 'Recovery hint' or tostring(Properties) has 'Recovery hint' | summarize Started=min(TimeGenerated), Ended=max(TimeGenerated), Spans=count(), ToolCalls=countif(is_tool), ToolFailures=countif(is_tool and (Success == false or tostring(Success) =~ 'false' or isnotempty(error))), PolicyBlocks=countif(is_policy_block), RetryHints=countif(is_retry_hint), AllowAll=max(toint(allow_all)), AllowAllTools=max(toint(allow_all_tools)), AllowAllPaths=max(toint(allow_all_paths)), AllowAllUrls=max(toint(allow_all_urls)), MaxAllowTools=max(allow_tool_count), MaxAllowUrls=max(allow_url_count), MaxDenyTools=max(deny_tool_count), MaxDenyUrls=max(deny_url_count), MaxAvailableTools=max(available_tool_count), MaxExcludedTools=max(excluded_tool_count), MaxDisabledMcp=max(disabled_mcp_server_count), MaxExtraMcpConfigs=max(extra_mcp_config_count), P95DurationMs=percentile(DurationMs, 95), Tools=make_set_if(tool, isnotempty(tool), 10), Agents=make_set_if(agent, isnotempty(agent), 5), Models=make_set_if(model, isnotempty(model), 5), Repos=make_set_if(repo, isnotempty(repo), 3), ConfiguredMcpServers=make_set_if(configured_mcp_servers, isnotempty(configured_mcp_servers), 10), DisabledMcpServerNames=make_set_if(disabled_mcp_servers, isnotempty(disabled_mcp_servers), 10), Errors=make_set_if(error, isnotempty(error), 10) by Session=conversation | extend AllowAll=coalesce(AllowAll, 0), AllowAllTools=coalesce(AllowAllTools, 0), AllowAllPaths=coalesce(AllowAllPaths, 0), AllowAllUrls=coalesce(AllowAllUrls, 0), MaxAllowTools=coalesce(MaxAllowTools, 0), MaxAllowUrls=coalesce(MaxAllowUrls, 0), MaxDenyTools=coalesce(MaxDenyTools, 0), MaxDenyUrls=coalesce(MaxDenyUrls, 0), MaxAvailableTools=coalesce(MaxAvailableTools, 0), MaxExcludedTools=coalesce(MaxExcludedTools, 0), MaxDisabledMcp=coalesce(MaxDisabledMcp, 0), MaxExtraMcpConfigs=coalesce(MaxExtraMcpConfigs, 0) | extend DurationSec=round(datetime_diff('millisecond', Ended, Started) / 1000.0, 2), FrictionScore=PolicyBlocks * 5 + ToolFailures * 3 + RetryHints * 2 + AllowAll * 2 + MaxDenyTools + MaxDenyUrls + MaxExcludedTools + MaxDisabledMcp, Posture=case(PolicyBlocks > 0, 'blocked', ToolFailures > 0, 'tool_failed', RetryHints > 0, 'retry_hint', AllowAll > 0, 'allow_all', AllowAllTools > 0 or AllowAllPaths > 0 or AllowAllUrls > 0, 'permissive_scope', MaxDenyTools > 0 or MaxDenyUrls > 0 or MaxExcludedTools > 0 or MaxDisabledMcp > 0, 'restricted', 'ok') | where Posture != 'ok' | project Started, Session, Posture, FrictionScore, DurationSec, Spans, ToolCalls, ToolFailures, PolicyBlocks, RetryHints, AllowAll, AllowAllTools, AllowAllPaths, AllowAllUrls, MaxAllowTools, MaxAllowUrls, MaxDenyTools, MaxDenyUrls, MaxAvailableTools, MaxExcludedTools, MaxDisabledMcp, MaxExtraMcpConfigs, P95DurationMs, Tools, Agents, Models, Repos, ConfiguredMcpServers, DisabledMcpServerNames, Errors | order by FrictionScore desc, Started desc | take 100
